title: ABOUT ME
description1: Full-stack web developer with extensive experience in creating modern, high-performance web applications. My journey has equipped me with proficiency in various technologies and frameworks to meet the diverse needs of my clients.
description2: I am currently expanding my skill set with Flutter for mobile development, and I use Figma to design intuitive and aesthetically pleasing user interfaces.
description3: My goal is to create web solutions that combine technical performance, attractive design, and optimal user experience.
cleanCodeDescription: I prioritize maintainable, well-structured, and documented code to ensure the quality of projects.
architectureDescription: I design scalable applications with clear architecture and good practices.
performanceDescription: I optimize loading speed, SEO, and user experience for fast and efficient websites.
